mapper.select: SELECT p.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM POINTS p LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON p.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON p.act_id = a.act_id WHERE p.point_id = #{pointId}
SELECT p.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM POINTS p LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON p.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON p.act_id = a.act_id WHERE p.vol_id = #{volId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.*, v.vol_name, a.act_title FROM POINTS p LEFT JOIN VOLUNTEER v ON p.vol_id = v.vol_id LEFT JOIN ACTIVITY a ON p.act_id = a.act_id ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO POINTS(vol_id, act_id, point_type, point_value, point_desc, point_balance) VALUES(#{volId}, #{actId}, #{pointType}, #{pointValue}, #{pointDesc}, #{pointBalance})
mapper.update: UPDATE POINTS SET point_value = #{pointValue}, point_desc = #{pointDesc} WHERE point_id = #{pointId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(point_value), 0) FROM POINTS WHERE vol_id = #{volId}
